𝗧𝗜𝗣𝗧𝗢𝗣 | Monitoring system resource usage and performance from the command line.  🔥 Super Hot!

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Monitoring system resource usage and performance from the command line.
📅 Created: Sep 2021 • Updated: May 2026

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Command-line system monitoring
✅ Real-time system statistics
✅ Graphs system data
✅ Cross-platform compatibility
✅ Textual-based interface
✅ Uses psutil for data fetching


╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 83 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 17 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Tiptop is a command-line system monitoring tool written in Python, inspired by 'top'. It provides real-time system statistics and visualizes them using graphs, working across all operating systems. It leverages Textual for its interface and psutil for data retrieval.

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/nschloe/tiptop

𝗦𝗔𝗠𝟯-𝗨𝗡𝗘𝗧 | Adapting large foundation models like SAM3 for specific image segmentation tasks with minimal computational resources.  🌟 Rising Fast!

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Adapting large foundation models like SAM3 for specific image segmentation tasks with minimal computational resources.
📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: May 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Simplified adaptation of SAM3
✅ Parameter-efficient fine-tuning
✅ Lightweight U-Net-style decoder
✅ Low GPU memory usage (< 6GB)
✅ Outperforms prior methods on tasks like mirror and salient object detection


❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 95 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 12 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 3 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SAM3-UNet is a simplified adaptation of the Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3) designed for efficient fine-tuning on downstream tasks. It combines a SAM3 image encoder with a parameter-efficient adapter and a lightweight U-Net decoder, achieving competitive performance with significantly reduced GPU memory requirements.

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/WZH0120/SAM3-UNet

𝗢𝗖-𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗪 | To provide a visually engaging and informative desktop companion that keeps users updated on the status and activity of their AI coding assistants.  🔥 Super Hot!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a visually engaging and informative desktop companion that keeps users updated on the status and activity of their AI coding assistants.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: May 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time monitoring of AI coding agent activity
✅ Desktop pet character with animations based on agent status
✅ Auto-discovery of local OpenClaw agents
✅ Live session viewing for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor
✅ SSH connectivity to remote OpenClaw instances
✅ Customizable characters, animations, and backgrounds
✅ Sound effects for completion and waiting states


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

🍴 12 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 8 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

OC-Claw is a desktop application that acts as a virtual pet to monitor the real-time activity of AI coding agents like OpenClaw, Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. It provides visual feedback through character animations and offers detailed session information, chat history, and usage metrics.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗗𝗔𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗜 | Exploring and manipulating data directly within the terminal environment using a keyboard-first interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Exploring and manipulating data directly within the terminal environment using a keyboard-first interface.
📅 Created: Sep 2025 • Updated: May 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Tabbed data views with quick navigation
✅ CSV/TSV, Excel, and SQLite import
✅ Polars-backed SQL queries and lazy evaluation
✅ Sorting, filtering, and column management
✅ Find, Find All, and value viewer
✅ JMESPath transforms and Add Columns
✅ Workspace persistence with Parquet snapshots


❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

🍴 7 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 7 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

DataTUI is a fast, keyboard-first terminal UI application built with Rust and Ratatui for exploring various data formats. It supports CSV/TSV, Excel, and SQLite, offering features like tabbed views, sorting, filtering, and SQL querying via Polars.

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗕𝗟𝗢𝗚𝗕𝗢𝗪𝗟 | Enabling users to easily create and manage blogs, changelogs, and help documentation without requiring any coding knowledge.  📈 Growing!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling users to easily create and manage blogs, changelogs, and help documentation without requiring any coding knowledge.
📅 Created: Sep 2025 • Updated: May 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Launch a full-featured blog or help center in minutes
✅ Prebuilt SEO-optimized and lightning-fast templates
✅ Notion-like editor
✅ Built-in newsletter support with Postmark integration
✅ Custom domain support
✅ Subscriber collection
✅ Newsletter management and sending


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

BlogBowl is an open-source, self-hosted blogging platform that allows users to quickly launch SEO-optimized blogs, product changelogs, and help documentation without coding. It features a Notion-like editor, built-in newsletter support with Postmark integration, and custom domain capabilities.

𝗦𝗤𝗨𝗜𝗥𝗥𝗘𝗟𝗗𝗜𝗦𝗞 | Identifying and visualizing large files and directories to free up disk space.  🔥 Super Hot!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Identifying and visualizing large files and directories to free up disk space.
📅 Created: Jan 2023 • Updated: May 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Fast scan and deep directory scanning
✅ Disk scanning or pick a directory
✅ External disks real-time detection
✅ Sunburst chart for disk usage visualization
✅ Drag and drop for collecting items to delete
✅ Right-click to open file explorer
✅ Cross-Platform (MacOS, Windows, Linux)
✅ Auto-updater

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SquirrelDisk is a cross-platform desktop application built with Rust and React (Tauri) for analyzing disk usage. It helps users quickly identify large files and folders consuming hard drive space, offering a visual representation of disk utilization through a sunburst chart.

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦
